ddls:
CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Father's name of the staff member */,
  "staff_type" INTEGER /* Type of staff (e.g., Salary Staff, Weekly Staff) */,
  "designation" INTEGER /* Designation or role of the staff member */,
  "cnic" TEXT /* CNIC number of the staff member */,
  "mobile_no" TEXT /* Mobile number of the staff member */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member joined the company */,
  "leaving_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member left the company, if applicable */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the staff member */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for direct deposits */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the staff member belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_designation FOREIGN KEY ("designation") REFERENCES designation ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_staff_type FOREIGN KEY ("staff_type") REFERENCES staff_type ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_payment" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment action */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "bhatta_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific payment type or bhatta */,
  "rate" REAL /* Payment rate for the staff member */,
  "staff_payment_action" TEXT /* Specific payment action (e.g., bonus, deduction) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, cash) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "payment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the payment (e.g., regular salary, bonus, deduction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_payment_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_payment_bhatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("bhatta_id") REFERENCES bhatta ("bhatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bhatta" (
  "bhatta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "bhatta_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment type */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment type became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment type will no longer be effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bhatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "expense_details" TEXT /* Details of the expense */,
  "expense_category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., travel, supplies, training) */,
  "reimbursable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the expense is reimbursable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_expenses_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_type" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the staff type */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rate for staff types that are paid hourly */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary for staff types that are paid a salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designation" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designation */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the designation belongs to */,
  "skills_required" TEXT /* List of skills required for the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designation_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_leave" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "leave_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "leave_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., annual, sick) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the leave */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the leave (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the staff member is on leave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_leave_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the staff member's performance */,
  "review_details" TEXT /* Details of the performance review */,
  "performance_category" TEXT /* Category of the performance (e.g., communication, productivity, teamwork) */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date for the next performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_performance_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "number_of_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
